name: IsoEnergy Ltd.
description: IsoEnergy Ltd. is a well-funded uranium exploration and development company with a portfolio of high-grade projects in the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, Canada. The company is best known for its 100% owned Hurricane discovery, which is one of the highest-grade uranium deposits in the world. IsoEnergy is focused on advancing its flagship assets while leveraging its experienced management team and strong financial position to create value for shareholders through discovery and development in premier mining jurisdictions.
